get.description:
Returns "pong" always, if the service is healthy.
This can also used for service health checks.

Get Profile Data of the authenticated user/entity.
This can also be used to check whether or not the Authentication is present and valid.

Get available Login Providers List. Can also be used to display login providers on UI.
Use getLoginProviderRedirect API to redirect to this Login Provider to perform login.

Redirect URL to redirect to the Login Provider's Authorization URL
based on the id of login provider given.

post.description:
Initiate new chat threads. Returns new thread_id in cookie
and the AI greeting message in response body.

put.description: Switch to new thread_id given in request body. Or clear current thread_id if given null.

get.description: Get the current thread_id of logged in user.

Get all threads of the logged in user,
based on limit and page number and sort order.

post.description:
Posts new message, from request body, into the thread_id given in cookie.
Returns AI's response in body.

get.description:
Get all messages of the given thread,
based on limit and page number and sort order.

post.description:
Posts new voice message, from request body, into the thread_id given in cookie.
Returns AI's response in body.

Initiate new quick chat. Quick Chat doesnt require auth.
Quick chat messages are not stored and they are deleted after user is finished.
Returns new session_id in cookie and the AI greeting message in response body.

Posts new message into quick chat, from request body.
Returns AI's response in body.

get.description:
Get all messages of the given thread,
based on limit and page number and sort order.

post.description:
Posts new voice message into quick chat, from request body.
Returns AI's response in body.
